MOTION AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY 2.12 IS DENIED AS MOOT, WITHDRAWN. MOTION IS GRANTED AS TO FORM INTERROGATORY 15.1 FOR DEFENDANT TO SERVE WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER FURTHER RESPONSES WHICH PROVIDE FACTS KNOWN TO THE DEFENDANT AS TO EACH DENIAL AND AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSE AS OF THE DATE FURTHER RESPONSES ARE SERVED, IF RESPONSES HAVE NOT YET BEEN SERVED. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two, Numbers 22, 23, 28, 37, 38; Responses To Requests For Documents, Set Two, Number 25-29, 31 And 33 And Verifications And Award Sanctions Against Defebdabt Amir Mogannam And His Attorney Of Record Jose Montalvo In The Amount Of $2,098.05
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq., T:415.533.0735, for plaintiff and moving party;
Jose A. Montalvo, Esq. of the Law Offices of John A. Biard, T:925.945.4218, for defendant and opposing party, on Court Call.

PLAINTIFF NICHOLAS KOCH's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set Two, Numbers 22, 23, 28, 37, 38; Responses To Requests For Documents, Set Two, Number 25-29, 31 And 33 And Verifications And Award Sanctions Against Defebdabt Amir Mogannam And His Attorney Of Record Jose Montalvo In The Amount Of $2,098.05.

Both parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. The motion is granted. Sanctions against Defendant in the amount of $750 is ordered to be paid within 30 days of this order as defendant did not seek an extension to provide amended responses, the amended responses were not provided until the motion was filed, and no verifications were served with the amended responses.

ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

Plaitniff Nicholas Kochs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories To Defendant Amir Mogannam, Set One; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And His Attorney Of Record Jose Montalvo In The Amount Of $1,873.05
Off Calendar Aug-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs NICHOLAS KOCH, NIHAL OZTEK, JESSE RHODES, and SHOSHANA WALTER's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories To Defendant Amir Mogannam, Set One; Request For Sanctions Against Defendant And His Attorney Of Record Jose Montalvo In The Amount Of $1,873.05 is Granted in part and Denied in part. Motion as to Form Interrogatory 2.12 is DENIED as moot, withdrawn. Motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory 15.1 for Defendant to serve within 10 days of notice of entry of order further responses which provide facts known to the defendant as to each denial and affirmative defense as of the date further responses are served, if responses have not yet been served. Request for Sanctions is DENIED.
Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
